title: Course Registration Conversation

segments.text: I'd like to enrol in the diploma programme.
Have you completed the entry assessment?
Yes, I scored seven out of ten.
You qualify for the standard pathway.
The programme is two years, with classes on Tuesday and Thursday evenings.
The total fee is three thousand four hundred pounds, payable in instalments.
There's also a one hundred pound registration fee due today.

transcript: I'd like to enrol in the diploma programme. Of course. Have you completed the entry assessment? Yes, I scored seven out of ten. Excellent. You qualify for the standard pathway. The programme is two years, with classes on Tuesday and Thursday evenings. The total fee is three thousand four hundred pounds, payable in instalments. There's also a one hundred pound registration fee due today. Can I pay by card? Yes, that's fine.
